steps.title: Substitute x = 348 into the function
steps.content:
The function is $f(x) = 57.40 - 0.15x$. To find the temperature on day 348, substitute $x = 348$:
$$f(348) = 57.40 - 0.15(348)$$

steps.title: Evaluate the arithmetic
steps.content:
First, compute the product:
$$0.15 \times 348 = 52.20$$
Then subtract from 57.40:
$$57.40 - 52.20 = 5.20$$
B is correct.
